pre_check_flags.detail: Diff size looks larger than expected: changed_lines=2771, expected≈10, ratio=277.10, files=19, hunks=51.

criteria.name: Postgres and SQLite editorial migrations
criteria.evidence: Both 004 migrations create checklist_items and epic_events with required columns, checks, FKs, prior_state JSON/TEXT, and indexes.

criteria.name: Lenient body.parse and read paths
criteria.evidence: agent_kit/body.py parse() catches malformed input and returns ParsedBody; read tools use body.parse only. Targeted tests passed.

criteria.name: Strict validate_for_write errors
criteria.evidence: validate_for_write raises exact title/goal messages; write tools convert them to structured body_missing_required_section results.

criteria.name: Body parser round-trip identity
criteria.evidence: tests/test_body_parser.py covers six required fixtures; pytest target passed.

criteria.name: _preamble includes title line
criteria.evidence: replace_section('_preamble', ...) reparses title-inclusive preamble; tests cover title replacement and removal rejection.

criteria.name: create_epic row, parsed title/goal, seed checklist, created event
criteria.evidence: create_epic writes parsed.title/goal_first_paragraph, seeds 18 default_seed items, and records created with initial snapshot.

criteria.name: run_turn(epic_id=None) bootstrap storage
criteria.evidence: loop skips locks/hot context for None, creates nullable rows, and create_epic retro-stamps inbound message and turn.

criteria.name: Bootstrap and errored no-epic envelopes
criteria.evidence: active_epic_id is refreshed after tool invocation; envelope schema accepts omitted/null epic_id; integration tests cover success and error paths.

criteria.name: Store.create_turn Optional signature
criteria.evidence: Protocol, SQLiteStore, and SupabaseStore accept epic_id: str | None; contract tests cover create_turn(None).

criteria.name: Envelope Optional epic_id schema
criteria.evidence: Envelope.epic_id is optional, schema removes it from required and accepts string/null; regression test validates omitted and explicit null.

criteria.name: CLI omitted --epic path
criteria.evidence: arnold/cli.py defaults --epic to None; tests/test_editorial_loop.py runs python -m arnold without --epic successfully.

criteria.name: Section edit preserves non-target sections
criteria.evidence: Integration compares raw section bytes from body_edit prior_state for non-target sections; targeted tests passed.

criteria.name: expected_diff mismatch refuses write
criteria.evidence: edit_epic checks diffs_equivalent before transaction writes and returns actual_diff; integration asserts unchanged DB.

criteria.name: expected_diff match commits transaction
criteria.evidence: Integration exercises matching expected_diff on Goal section and verifies commit/event behavior.

criteria.name: meta edits rejected
criteria.evidence: edit_epic returns meta_not_supported with _preamble/Goal hint before loading or mutating epic.

criteria.name: revert latest transaction snapshot
criteria.evidence: revert captures pre-revert body/title/goal/checklist in reverted_to prior_state and applies prior body/checklist in reverse.

criteria.name: get_epic_at_time replay
criteria.evidence: editorial_reads replays body_edit/checklist_change/reverted_to/created; integration covers turn 5, before revert, and before creation initial state.

criteria.name: get_recent_turns and search_tool_calls
criteria.evidence: Store adapters implement both queries; integration asserts 5 most-recent turns and edit_epic call search results.

criteria.name: Tool operation_kind audit semantics
criteria.evidence: All editorial read tools register read and write tools register write; integration asserts persisted tool_calls values.

criteria.name: Turn-end epic_outline log
criteria.evidence: loop logs application epic_outline after completed create/edit/revert turns with title, sections, and line counts; integration asserts one per touching turn.

criteria.name: 10-turn FakeModel integration fixture
criteria.evidence: tests/test_editorial_loop.py covers no-epic bootstrap, six sections, expected_diff match/mismatch, _preamble title edit, revert, replay, read tools, audit kinds, and outline logs; passed locally.

criteria.name: Pre-existing tests continue to pass
criteria.evidence: Full python -m pytest -x rerun reached 49 passed/1 skipped then stopped on known unrelated secret-scan failure in .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident, not files modified by this implementation.

criteria.name: Store adapter column guards
criteria.evidence: Both adapters define _EPIC_COLUMNS/_CHECKLIST_COLUMNS, route updates through _update, and include epic_id in message/turn allowed columns.

criteria.name: Focused body module surface
criteria.evidence: agent_kit/body.py is stdlib-only and contains parser, serializer, validation, section ops, diff helpers, and outline; no Store/tool imports.

criteria.name: Mixed body ops rejected
criteria.evidence: edit_epic computes body op names across supported forms and returns body_op_conflict when more than one is present.

criteria.name: Body module size/dependencies
criteria.evidence: agent_kit/body.py is 253 lines and imports only dataclasses, difflib, and re from stdlib.

summary: Approved. The Sprint 2a implementation satisfies the must criteria. The only full-suite failure reproduced is the pre-existing secret-scan hit in prior .megaplan sprint artifacts, not this diff. FLAG-006 remains an accepted body_version deferral per settled decision SD-015, not an implementation blocker.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Postgres migration matches required editorial tables and indexes.
Pass. SQLite migration and prior_state JSON registration are present.
Pass. Supabase truncate fixture includes new tables.
Pass. Body parser implements lenient parse, strict validation, section ops, and diff helpers.
Pass. Template and 18 checklist seed items are implemented.
Pass. Parser tests cover required fixtures and passed.
Pass. Store Protocol includes editorial surface and nullable create_turn.
Pass. SupabaseStore implements editorial persistence surface and guards.
Pass. SQLiteStore mirrors editorial persistence surface and guards.
Pass. Store contract covers new surface and create_turn(None).
Pass. Write tools implement create/edit/revert/render semantics.
Pass. Read tools implement section/history/replay/search semantics with read operation_kind.
Pass. Loop imports editorial tool modules for registration.
Pass. No-epic run_turn and active_epic_id handoff implemented.
Pass. Envelope/schema nullable epic_id implemented.
Pass. CLI --epic is optional and no-epic path is documented.
Pass. epic_outline logging is implemented and gated correctly.
Pass. Editorial loop integration test covers acceptance criteria and passed.
Pass. Envelope null/omitted schema regression test added.
Pass with caveat. Targeted suites pass; full suite stops on unrelated pre-existing secret-scan failure.
Pass. Optional live Supabase action was surfaced as human-provided infra.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed with caveat: full suite blocked by unrelated pre-existing secret-scan failure, while targeted Sprint 2a suites passed.
